other_observers: Subsequently observed continuously at this location, through date of this submission (May 2 2020)
specific_location: Sand Creek, just east of intersection with Westerly Creek
description: Flitting about the reeds on the north side of Sand Creek, among White-crowned Sparrow and Song Sparrow, and of a comparable size. Golden forecrown, with dark but patchy (not uniformly black) head to mid-eye. Faint partial white eye ring, two-toned bill, unstreaked breast. Observed for about 10 minutes and photographed.
